title: Decoration by Gonca
description: This mods adds decoration blocks to the vanilla minecraft, for now we have the brick block in all color that minecraft offers and brick variants for other blocks.
body:
Hello, my name is Gonca and i made this simple decoration mod that adds more decorations blocks to the vanilla minecraft. For now we have the brick block painted in every color that minecraft has, and its variants (like slabs and stairs), we also have brick variants for some other blocks.

Youtube showcase - https://youtu.be/amiks5zOxb0?si=4QN4gAB8WucGcrh_
